purpose: Technical-first B1-B10 resolution program. Downstream translation is deferred until technical gates pass.

directions.technical_solution_target: Compiler method that reduces routed two-qubit work and exposure across external benchmarks while emitting replayable semantic certificates.
directions.current_evidence: 30/30 circuits; 481 virtual SWAPs removed; 37.18% 2Q reduction; 481/481 proof replay; post-virtual-SWAP 1Q resynthesis gives 1.018x logical T-count proxy; native Z-phase canonicalization gives a further 1.000990x; targeted control-RZ commuting removes 380 RZ gates and gives 1.119x logical T-count proxy over the native pass; U3 phase factoring now factors 1641 U3 gates, removes 313 additional RZ gates after factoring, emits 1641 factorization certificate events plus 3242 RZ-commute certificate events, passes 30/30 Aer cross-checks, and gives a further 1.036371x logical T-count proxy over control-RZ. T-B1-004a exposes 270 arbitrary decimal rotations and 3 target cone classes; T-B1-004b shows cone_01 has 35 pair-local single-arbitrary windows; T-B1-004c tests those 35 windows under remove-only, fixed-Z, and continuous-RZ same-envelope replacement and gets 0 exact-pass windows, best continuous-RZ residual 0.36435162331705345.
directions.main_blocker: No calibrated/live-like heavy-hex baseline; dynamic-circuit/reset/classical-control gaps; FT synthesis ledger re-costs sat_n11 as exact Clifford+T rotations and moves it to data-path dominance under parallel factories, but the new B7 min-STV boundary is gcm_h6 at 1.086008x; target and cone-feasibility gates now isolate cone_01, and the simple phase-absorption route is closed, but there is still no rewrite, no semantic certificate, no obstruction theorem, and no resource reduction.
directions.next_experiment: Run T-B1-004: synthesize or prove a broader local two-qubit semantic rewrite, KAK/Clifford scaffold, or alternate certificate-bearing transformation for at least 30 cone_01 windows; emit replayable certificates, remove at least 30 arbitrary rotation occurrences or 600 proxy-T units, and re-run the B7 FT ledger.

directions.technical_solution_target: Code/schedule/decoder comparison that beats surface-code target volume under the same confidence-bounded metric.
directions.current_evidence: Stim/PyMatching baseline; closed reduced-round artifact boundary; T-B2-003 leakage-flagged analytic boundary; T-B2-004 Stim HERALDED_ERASE / DEPOLARIZE1 stress; T-B2-005 false-positive overhead stress; T-B2-006 posterior-calibrated shot-conditioned leakage boundary; T-B2-007 posterior-weighted decoder-risk ledger; T-B2-008 decoder-input contract feasibility gate; T-B2-009a per-shot decoder trace packet; T-B2-009b posterior-likelihood injection gate; T-B2-009c DEM-informed detector-to-edge semantics gate; and T-B2-009d hardware-like leakage observation model gate. The latest gate consumes 3 strict challenge rows across 3 observation profiles / 1728 profile-shots with 864 holdout profile-shots. The best conservative hardware-like profile changes 0 predictions, fixes 0 failures, introduces 0 failures, leaves 22 injected failures, and has holdout failure delta 0; the stress profile generates 727 model flag events but still fixes 0 failures. Holdout improvement remains false and route demotion remains recommended.
directions.main_blocker: The reduced-round lever remains closed as a small-distance/aggressive artifact. The heralded-erasure route now has per-shot traces, synthetic posterior-weight injection, DEM-informed edge semantics, and a detector-bitstring-driven hardware-like leakage observation model, but none improves failures. The model is still not calibrated, not hardware-derived, and not a production decoder. The route still lacks real calibrated leakage/flag observations, independent hardware traces, and distance-scaling runtime/threshold curves under calibrated posterior injection.
directions.next_experiment: Run T-B2-009e: replace the hardware-like observation model with real calibrated leakage/flag observations or independently supplied hardware traces, then require holdout improvement plus all-challenge non-regression before feeding B7.
directions.next_technical_experiment: Run T-B2-009e: replace the hardware-like observation model with real calibrated leakage/flag observations or independently supplied hardware traces, then require holdout improvement plus all-challenge non-regression before feeding B7.

directions.technical_solution_target: Reaction-coordinate quantum resource estimate tied to observable error and classical baselines.
directions.current_evidence: PySCF small-molecule proxy plus B10-T1 reaction-coordinate denominators; B3 artifacts now run through T-B3-011. T-B3-011 covers H2/LiH/H2O/N2 with bounded high-coefficient sampled UCC/ADAPT pressure: 35 sampled groups total, 384 shots/group, mean/max relative variance error 0.0833/0.5029, max optimizer-loop shots lower bound 475,043,013,690,000, max optimizer-loop 2Q lower bound 281,225,464,104,480,000, and selected-CI larger-basis denominator wins remain 0.
directions.main_blocker: The current one-parameter UCC/ADAPT plus QWC route is demoted: it lacks converged multi-parameter chemistry, full compiled covariance, all-group sampling, and any advantage win, while optimizer-loop lower bounds are prohibitive.
directions.next_experiment: Keep B3 as a negative-boundary track unless T-B3-012 produces real multi-parameter UCCSD/ADAPT covariance or stronger-than-QWC measurement that beats selected-CI/DMRG/tensor denominators after optimizer-loop accounting.

directions.technical_solution_target: Circuit-level verifiable advantage task with explicit completeness/soundness against adaptive spoofers.
directions.current_evidence: Toy hidden-trap protocol rejects four spoofing families; shared B4/B8 CNOT hidden-projection refresh task runs 3 circuit-derived tasks / 192 configs with honest completeness 1.0, no-refresh high-leakage max soundness 0.675, and repaired high-leakage max soundness 0.0.
directions.main_blocker: The new task is still a CNOT/projection proxy, not a hardware-executable randomized-measurement protocol, hardness result, or quantum advantage claim.
directions.next_experiment: Upgrade the CNOT hidden-projection proxy to hardware-executable randomized measurement circuits or attack it with trained/generative spoofers.

directions.technical_solution_target: Hybrid quantum-tensor/embedding solver improving accuracy-per-resource on a meaningful correlated model.
directions.current_evidence: Exact small Hubbard plus cluster proxy; T-B5-001 oracle-tuned response denominator; T-B5-002 non-oracle response embedding denominator; T-B5-003a exact-state-seeded MPS/Schmidt pressure reference; T-B5-003b non-exact-state-seeded one-site MPS/ALS prototype; T-B5-004 two-site finite-DMRG-style pressure prototype; T-B5-005 canonical DMRG readiness gate; and T-B5-006a canonical-environment smoke gate on the same 9 B10 D5 rows. The readiness gate evaluates 8 production-readiness conditions, passes 0, fails 8, keeps the seeded MPS pressure reference as strongest, records 0 non-seeded rows beating seeded pressure, and keeps production DMRG, quantum response win, accuracy-per-resource win, and same-access positive route all false. The smoke gate records 9 environment ledgers, 0 smoke-passed rows, 3 rows passing fixed-sector norm / energy variance / discarded-weight / monotonicity checks, 0 rows close to seeded MPS pressure, and 0 rows beating seeded pressure.
directions.main_blocker: The current tensor portfolio is a pressure ladder, not a mature canonical-environment DMRG solver. The two-site prototype beats ALS on 4 rows but is worse overall; both non-seeded prototypes beat exact-state-seeded MPS pressure on 0 rows; prototype fixed-sector norms can pass only on 3 of 9 smoke-gate rows and the complete canonical-environment smoke gate passes 0 rows; no costed same-access quantum response kernel exists.
directions.next_experiment: Run T-B5-006 / T-B10-014: implement a mature canonical-environment DMRG/MPS response reference with stored environments, orthonormal residuals, sweep convergence, no exact-state seeding, and full cost accounting; or compare a fully costed quantum impurity/response kernel against the D5 denominator ladder.

directions.technical_solution_target: Leakage-controlled high-Tc candidate ranking pipeline using physics descriptors, not family priors.
directions.current_evidence: Toy descriptor ranker plus T-B6-001 curated leakage audit, T-B6-002 formula-derived descriptor screen, and T-B6-003 structural/electronic proxy boundary. The latest B6 artifact keeps 38 records / 22 families / 12 expanded negative controls, replaces formula-only score with curated structural/electronic proxy channels, improves AP@12 from formula 0.10 to structural 0.611, but still loses to family-prior AP@12 1.0; post-split structural AP is 0.690 vs family-prior 0.982, family-holdout structural mean AP is 0.896, and top-12 still contains 3 negative controls. No discovery, mechanism, complete-database, DFT, crystallographic-database, or computed-observable claim.
directions.main_blocker: Structural/electronic proxy channels now beat formula-only descriptors, but family-prior leakage still dominates and negative controls remain high in the ranked list. The proxy is curated/imputed, not real crystallographic, DFT, B5-DMRG, or quantum-observable data.
directions.next_experiment: Run T-B6-004: replace curated proxy channels with actual crystallographic, DFT, or B5-computed structural/electronic observables, then expand post-2008 negatives until family priors and random baselines cannot saturate.

directions.technical_solution_target: End-to-end fault-tolerant resource ledger where B1/B2 improvements survive workload DAGs, factories, layout, and feed-forward.
directions.current_evidence: B1/B2 dependency bridge: 1.195x-1.616x conservative STV reduction; workload-DAG factory schedule: mean 1.475x; original logical T-factory schedule exposed a 1.0x min-STV boundary; control-RZ commute schedule improves min STV to 1.121951x; U3 phase-factored schedule preserves min STV at 1.121951x and improves mean STV to 1.234394x; FT synthesis ledger exposes gcm_h6 as the new min row at 1.086008x; T-B7-004 through T-B7-010a show precision-aware budgets, local same-axis merge, shared cache, nonlocal adjacent cancellation, four tested w8_21 rewrite families, and one-angle retained-template routes do not produce a certified occurrence-removing saving. T-B1-004c now shows the simple same-envelope cone_01 phase-removal route has 0 exact-pass windows, so B7 cannot count a cone_01 saving without a broader certificate.
directions.main_blocker: gcm_h6 remains factory-path dominated; cone_01 is still the concrete B1 rewrite target, but the simple phase-only route is closed and B7 still has no physical resource claim without a replayable occurrence-removing semantic certificate and a refreshed FT ledger.
directions.next_experiment: Run T-B1-004: produce a certified broader cone_01 occurrence-removing rewrite for at least 30 windows, or a scoped symbolic obstruction; then re-run B7 only if a rewrite certificate exists.

directions.technical_solution_target: Classical verifier whose soundness stays low under adaptive leakage through challenge refresh/projection rotation.
directions.current_evidence: Honest completeness 1.0; five adversaries rejected; 0.75 leakage failure boundary; toy refresh/rotation repair makes high-leakage repair modes pass <=5% soundness; shared B4/B8 circuit-refresh task instantiates refresh/rotation on CNOT hidden-projection tasks and reduces high-leakage adaptive soundness from 0.675 without refresh to 0.0 under the best repaired modes; trained/generative spoofer stress runs 144 configs and shows no-refresh high leakage reaches learned soundness 1.0; B10-T2 proof-obligation gate rejects no-refresh high-leakage claims; restricted lemma gives a 8.94e-44 single-unknown-mask bound; transcript leakage simulator runs 192 configs; device-noise transcript bridge runs 480 configs and keeps challenge_refresh/refresh_plus_rotation high-leakage soundness <=0.0208 under bounded noise; Qiskit/Aer verifier bridge instantiates 216 ideal randomized parity-verifier circuits with 0 semantic mismatches and honest completeness 1.0; noisy Aer bridge executes 9600 randomized parity-verifier circuits with circuit-level adversary inputs, bridge-safe noisy honest acceptance 1.0, and bridge-safe noisy adversary acceptance 0.0; backend-calibrated-style bridge derives per-qubit/per-edge Aer noise from Qiskit GenericBackendV2 target InstructionProperties and executes 5760 circuits with safe calibrated honest acceptance 1.0, safe calibrated adversary acceptance 0.25, and max honest predicate-bit error 0.0703125.
directions.main_blocker: The circuit-refresh, trained-spoofer, proof gate, restricted lemma, transcript simulator, device-noise bridge, and Aer bridges remain CNOT hidden-projection/proxy evidence. T-B10-008 now adds GenericBackendV2 calibration-style noise parameters, but it is still not real backend properties, hardware randomized-measurement verifier execution, cryptographic soundness, or sampling-hardness.
directions.next_experiment: Replace GenericBackendV2 snapshots with real backend properties or run a hardware randomized-measurement verifier, then compare against the noisy Aer, backend-calibrated-style, and transcript device-noise bridges.

directions.technical_solution_target: Formal restricted theorem or negative lemma about gap amplification/local-Hamiltonian hardness.
directions.current_evidence: 18-instance gap lab; 9 locality-preserving candidates; 0 accepted local candidates; finite-instance failed gap-amplification negative lemma with 4 strict width-trap counterexamples, 9 dense locality traps, and 5 proof obligations; Lean-style symbolic skeleton with 5 definitions, 3 theorem skeletons, and the same 5 open obligations; named-family cluster_stabilizer_open_uniform_reweight skeleton for n=4,5,6 showing all terms uniformly scaled by 1.35, max locality preserved at 3, raw gap amplified, normalized gap invariant, and the certificate rejected as global energy rescaling.
directions.main_blocker: The named-family statement is still not proof-assistant checked over all n; the current PATH `lean` command failed and is not a usable Lean/mathlib theorem-prover environment here. It is not a Quantum PCP proof, NLTS theorem, local-Hamiltonian hardness theorem, or global gap-amplification impossibility result.
directions.next_experiment: Run T-B9-004: create a real Lean/mathlib or equivalent proof-checkable project and formalize support-size, uniform-scaling, spectral-width, and normalized-gap invariance lemmas for the open-boundary cluster-stabilizer family for all n >= 4.

directions.technical_solution_target: Formal theorem targets separating robust BQP advantage from fragile input/oracle/verification assumptions.
directions.current_evidence: 12-node/14-edge reduction graph; 2 formal theorem target cards; B10-T1 explicit-I/O accounting lemma, source-backed denominator note, D1/D2 and D5 denominator tables, B3/B5 denominator boundary comparison, T-B10-010 missing-assumption theorem note, T-B10-011 asymptotic access-contract note, T-B10-012 B5 same-access sampling-or-DMRG bridge, T-B10-013 optimistic response-sampler cost stress, T-B5-005 canonical DMRG readiness gate, and T-B5-006a canonical-environment smoke gate. The latest B5 smoke gate records 9 environment ledgers but 0 smoke-passed rows, 0 rows close to seeded MPS pressure, 0 rows beating seeded pressure, and preserves no-production-DMRG/no-quantum-win/no-same-access-positive-route claim boundaries. B10-T2 remains a verifier proxy stack through backend-calibrated-style GenericBackendV2.
directions.main_blocker: B10-T1 remains narrowed to a concrete B5 access-model blocker: no mature canonical DMRG/MPS denominator, no response-observable sampling oracle with variance/preparation costs, no same-access positive route, and no quantum response kernel that beats the full denominator ladder. The new smoke gate makes the canonical-environment blocker sharper but does not remove it.
directions.next_experiment: Run T-B10-014 with T-B5-006: implement mature canonical-environment production DMRG/MPS for the same B5 Hubbard response rows, or construct a real same-access response oracle with state-preparation, mixing, measurement, confidence, optimizer-loop, and classical denominator costs that beats the full ladder; keep T-B10-009 for real backend verifier evidence.
directions.next_technical_experiment: Run T-B10-014 with T-B5-006: implement mature canonical-environment production DMRG/MPS for the same B5 Hubbard response rows, or construct a real same-access response oracle with state-preparation, mixing, measurement, confidence, optimizer-loop, and classical denominator costs that beats the full ladder; keep T-B10-009 for real backend verifier evidence.

downstream_translation_rule: No direction moves into publication, patent, financing, or productization as an active deliverable until it passes its technical gate.
